meaning: adj.无友人的,无依的,没有被当作朋友对待的
examples: Tom noticed this, and it strongly inclined his sympathies toward her in her perilous and unfriended situation.
Some people I really don't talk to, so I unfriended them.
Today they unfriended them with news that Instagram integration had been disabled with Twitter Cards.
Interestingly enough, women were more likely than men to shun someone who had unfriended them on Facebook.
"He said he'd only 'unfriended' me to protect himself, because if someone flirted with me he would feel jealous, " Mr. Garcia says.
